name: Potato Pancakes (Ceideburg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cold mashed potatoes and eggs together until well combined.
2. Add the dehydrated onion flakes and stir to incorporate them evenly.
3. Pour the mixture onto a heated griddle or skillet.
4. Cook one side until golden brown, then flip the pancake and cook the other side until browned.
5. Remove from heat and serve warm.
